content.text:
<user_query>
Assess these three changed files for blocking problems against the checklist: 1) required fields collected via explicit prompts, 2) required/optional defaults shown, 3) payload key conflicts with dispatcher expectations from ~/.cursor/scripts/deploy_fuyao_sweep_dispatcher.sh / orchestrator flows, 4) precision of operator phrasing. Report only blocking issues and confidence.
</user_query>

Blocking issues found:

1. High: `~/.cursor/scripts/deploy_fuyao_sweep_dispatcher.sh:761` builds `combos`, but dispatch and reporting read `combinations` (`:809`, `:813`, `:820`, `:886`), so combo-specific payload/log naming and summary can fail under `set -u` or produce empty/incorrect per-combo data.  
Confidence: 0.99

2. High: `~/.cursor/scripts/deploy_fuyao_sweep_dispatcher.sh:843-844` has a broken `run_combo` launch split across two lines (`&` then a standalone redirection), which is invalid Bash structure for the intended command pipeline. This blocks reliable parallel dispatch startup.  
Confidence: 0.98

3. High: `~/.cursor/scripts/deploy_fuyao_sweep_dispatcher.sh:691-699` and `:701-707` treat `false`/`0` as hard validation failures via `is_true`, so payload defaults like `dry_run: false` and user-requested `continue_on_error: false` (documented in both command/skill) will fail validation and stop execution.  
Confidence: 0.97

No blocking issues were found in the changed operator-contract files for prompt/default collection semantics (`~/.cursor/commands/sweep-fuyao.md`, `~/.cursor/skills/hp-sweep-orchestrator/SKILL.md`) beyond the script-level blockers above.
